title: Metiq advertises SoulFactory customization capabilities
intended_behavior: Metiq kind:30317 capability content uses the v2 SoulFactory runtime capability schema, lists all customization runtime-control methods, and declares feature availability plus OpenClaw parity metadata so controllers can feature-gate partial/stubbed support.
observed_baseline: Metiq already returned the customization method list through SoulFactoryMethods(), but the capability content only carried v1 method/controller metadata and no feature availability or parity block.
